title: In the Night Garden Cuddly Soft Toy CBeebies Upsy Daisy Softie 30cm for Babies Toddlers 0-3 Suitable from Birth Colourful Comforting Cuddly Toy, Pink, Ice
features: Sustainably made from 100% recycled fabrics and filling. This toy is made from 5 recycled plastic bottles
Upsy Daisy Softie makes the perfect cuddle companion
Official licensed product: based on the lead character from the much loved and trusted CBeebies show, In the Night Garden
From the top of their heads to the tips of their toes, Golden Bear’s soft toys will help children play today and protect tomorrow
description: Introducing the all new Upsy Daisy softie! This scrumptiously soft toy is based on the iconic Upsy Daisy character from the much loved and trusted CBeebies show In the Night Garden. The soft, colourful fabrics and cute print detailing will help to stimulate little one’s senses through touch and sight as well as provide lots of comfort and reassurance at any time of the day. We are committed to reducing our impact on the planet and helping children to play today and protect tomorrow! Our adorable Upsy Daisy Softie is made from 100% recycled fabrics and filling! Whether you are looking for a Birthday gift, Christmas gift or other event, the In the Night Garden Upsy Daisy Softie is perfect for children from birth.
